\tzpentry{ID5246}{Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5246 introduces Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$W[M_{\text{tot}}] = \nabla^2 M_{\text{tot}} - \frac{1}{c^2}\partial_t^2 M_{\text{tot}} = 0 - 0 = 0$
\]
